commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But seek not Bethel, nor enter into Gilgal, and pass not to Beersheba: for Gilgal shall surely go into captivity, and Bethel shall come to nothing. The places where they worshipped their idols. (Challoner) They had all been honoured by the patriarchs. Bersabee had belonged to Juda under Achab, 3 Kings xix. But it was originally in the tribe of Simeon, and Jeroboam II recovered all that had been lost, 4 Kings xiv. (Calmet) Unprofitable. Hebrew leaven, "for vanity "(Haydock) Bet haven.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: But seek not Bethel: Bethel, Galgal, Bersabee: the places where they worshipped their idols.
